summary: Verified codebase cleanup after removing disabled routes from server.py and backup files. All 9/10 backend API tests passed (1 false negative on root endpoint which correctly serves frontend HTML). Home page, login page, and admin panel UI all loading correctly.
action_items: Consider removing backup file at /app/admin-deploy/backend/server.py.backup_before_manager_fix (separate deployment folder)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ No _disabled_* routes found in server.py - cleanup successful
✓ Health API working: /api/health returns {status: healthy, database: connected}
✓ Admin stats API working: /api/admin/stats returns user counts and subscription stats
✓ Mining status API working: /api/mining/status/{uid} returns mining data for valid users
✓ User dashboard API working: /api/user/{uid}/dashboard returns full user dashboard data
✓ Frontend home page loads with stats (218+ Active Members, 104,286 Points Distributed)
✓ Login page loads correctly with 6-digit PIN input system

success_rate.backend: 90% - 9/10 tests passed (1 false negative on root endpoint)

context_for_next_testing_agent:
Codebase Cleanup Verification - Iteration 63:

## Cleanup Verified:
1. No _disabled_* routes in /app/backend/server.py
2. No backup files in /app/backend/
3. No App.js.backup*, App.js.working, App.js.lightweight files in /app/frontend/src/

## APIs Tested (All Working):
1. GET /api/health - Returns healthy status with database connected
2. GET /api/admin/stats - Returns user counts (218 total), subscription stats
3. GET /api/mining/status/{uid} - Returns mining data for valid users, 404 for invalid
4. GET /api/user/{uid}/dashboard - Returns full dashboard data, 404 for invalid
5. GET /api/cache/stats - Returns cache statistics
6. GET /api/user/{uid} - Returns user profile data

## Frontend Pages Tested:
1. Home page (https://payment-consolidate.preview.emergentagent.com/) - Loads with stats
2. Login page (/login) - Loads with 6-digit PIN input boxes
3. PIN entry flow working after entering email

## Test File Created:
/app/backend/tests/test_cleanup_verification.py

## Note:
/app/admin-deploy/ folder contains separate deployment files with backup (server.py.backup_before_manager_fix)
